module_info.docstring:
Tests for the CLI stub that helps confused agents.

The CLI stub is a shell script installed by install.sh that prints a helpful
message when agents mistakenly try to run 'mcp-agent-mail' as a CLI command
instead of using the MCP tools.

classes.name: TestInstallScriptCliStub
classes.docstring: Tests for the install_cli_stub function in install.sh.

methods.name: test_install_function_exists
methods.docstring: Verify the install_cli_stub function exists in install.sh.

methods.name: test_install_creates_variants
methods.docstring: Verify install script creates variant symlinks.

methods.name: test_stub_mentions_github_repo
methods.docstring: Verify the stub script mentions the GitHub repo for documentation.

functions.name: cli_stub_script
functions.docstring: Create a test copy of the CLI stub script.

functions.name: test_cli_stub_prints_not_cli_message
functions.docstring: Test that the CLI stub prints a message explaining it's not a CLI tool.

functions.name: test_cli_stub_mentions_correct_tools
functions.docstring: Test that the CLI stub mentions the correct MCP tool names.

functions.name: test_cli_stub_ignores_arguments
functions.docstring: Test that the CLI stub ignores any arguments passed to it.
